name: Cafe Au Lait Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Instant coffee, dissolved in 3 tablespoons Hot water
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 10-inch springform pan.
2. CRUST: In a medium bowl, combine the butter cookie crumbs, sugar, and butter. Blend well with fingers, fork, or pastry blender. Press or pat the mixture onto the bottom and sides of the prepared springform pan. Chill in the freezer or refrigerator for about 30 minutes.
3. FILLING: Soften gelatin in cold water. In a small saucepan, combine egg yolks and sugar, stirring gradually into the light cream over medium heat until it coats a metal spoon. Remove from heat and stir in softened gelatin. Beat cream cheese until very smooth and creamy, then add vanilla and continue to beat until smooth. Add gelatin mixture to the cheese mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes or until set. Whip heavy cream and egg whites separately until stiff; fold into the cheese mixture. Heat instant coffee dissolved in water and coffee liqueur in a small saucepan, stirring until smooth. Add to the cheese mixture and beat until very smooth and creamy.
5. Pour batter into the chilled springform pan and refrigerate for 3 hours or until set. Carefully remove sides of the springform pan, transfer cake to serving dish, and serve.
